name: workflow-recorder
description: Full automatic workflow recording and replay for Windows — equivalent to macOS Record & Replay. Uses a C# background recorder with global mouse/keyboard hooks to silently capture clicks, key presses, window titles, and screenshots, then generates reusable Codex skills.

skills.name: record-workflow
skills.description: Fully automatic workflow recording for Windows — equivalent to macOS Record & Replay. Use when Codex needs to capture a multi-step workflow by silently recording mouse clicks, keyboard input, window titles, and screenshots via a hidden C# background process. Generates a reusable skill from the captured data.

interface.shortDescription: Record and replay desktop workflows on Windows
interface.longDescription: Equivalent to macOS Record & Replay. Records mouse clicks, keyboard input, and screenshots via a background C# process, then generates reusable Codex skills.
defaultPrompt: Record my expense report submission workflow
Record how I create a new project in our system
Use the recorded workflow to repeat this task
